entities.name: SMALLHOLDER AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agriculture practiced by farmers with small landholdings, highly vulnerable to climate variability.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY AND CHANGE
entities.description: Fluctuations and long-term shifts in climate patterns affecting agriculture.

entities.name: DIGITAL INNOVATION INITIATIVE
entities.description: An initiative aimed at equipping farmers with actionable weather-based agro advisories.

entities.name: WEATHER-BASED AGRO ADVISORIES
entities.description: Actionable advice based on weather data to improve farm management and mitigate risks.

entities.name: FARM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of managing farm operations to optimize production and mitigate risks.

entities.name: CLIMATE RISKS
entities.description: Potential negative impacts on agriculture due to climate variability and change.

entities.name: CONTEXTUALIZED CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Climate data and advice tailored to specific local contexts and farmer needs.

entities.name: RAYAGADA
entities.description: A district in Odisha, India, where the study was conducted.

entities.name: GAJAPATI
entities.description: A district in Odisha, India, where the study was conducted.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A state in India where the case study took place.

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agriculture that relies solely on rainfall for water supply.

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of farmers to recover from and adapt to climate-related shocks.

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING
entities.description: The process by which farmers make choices regarding farming activities.

entities.name: MIXED-METHODS APPROACH
entities.description: A research methodology combining quantitative surveys and qualitative focus group discussions.

entities.name: SURVEYS
entities.description: A data collection method involving structured questionnaires administered to farmers.

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection method involving group interactions to gather insights.

entities.name: GENDER-SENSITIVE ADVISORIES
entities.description: Climate advisories designed to address the specific needs and roles of both male and female farmers.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Indigenous or local knowledge passed down through generations used in farming.

entities.name: MARKET DYNAMICS
entities.description: Economic factors and forces that influence the pricing and sale of agricultural products.

entities.name: SOCIAL INFLUENCES
entities.description: The impact of social networks and community norms on farmer behavior.

entities.name: DIGITAL CLIMATE SERVICES
entities.description: Technology-driven services providing climate information to users.

entities.name: ISAT
entities.description: A specific provider of digital climate services.

entities.name: CROP SOWING
entities.description: The activity of planting seeds in the field.

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: Activities aimed at protecting crops from pests, diseases, and weeds.

entities.name: LAND PREPARATION
entities.description: The process of preparing the soil for planting.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to land or soil.

entities.name: CROP AND CULTIVAR CHOICE
entities.description: The decision process of selecting which crop and variety to plant.

entities.name: SEASONAL CLIMATE FORECAST
entities.description: Predictions of climate conditions over a season used for long-term planning.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Established farming methods based on local customs and experience.

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for smallholder farmers.
